title: The Hawk's Nest
writer: Wid Gunning, James T. O'Donohoe, Casey Robinson
actors: Milton Sills, Doris Kenyon, Sôjin Kamiyama
plot: Gangsters John Finchley and James Kent operate a speakeasy in New York called "The Hawk's Nest", and Dan Daugherty is the owner of a rival nightclub that also caters to Chinatwon tourists. Daugherty frames Kent and the latter is s...
